summary: Terraform Modules Infrastructure Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend InfraTab verified showing TF Modules stat card (11 Modules), expandable module cards with resources/variables/outputs/code, and Terraform Environments (prod/staging).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/cve/iac/terraform/modules returns correct data: 11 modules, 30 resources, 2 environments
All 11 modules present: cognito, dynamodb, eventbridge, kinesis, lambda, media-convert, qldb, s3-cloudfront, secrets-manager, sns, stepfunctions
Each module has correct fields: name, description, icon, category, files, resources, variables, outputs
Frontend TF Modules stat card shows '11 Modules' correctly
Terraform Modules (11) collapsible section renders all 11 modules with metadata
Expanding a module shows resources, variables, outputs, and file tabs with syntax-highlighted code blocks
Terraform Environments section shows prod and staging with 3 files each
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - testing existing infrastructure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Terraform modules infrastructure complete. GET /api/cve/iac/terraform/modules endpoint scans /app/infra-terraform/modules/ directory and returns module metadata with file contents. Frontend InfraTab displays TF Modules stat card and expandable module panels. All existing live AWS/GitHub endpoints continue to work.

mocked_apis.note: All data is served from actual Terraform files under /app/infra-terraform/

Backend_TerraformModules_Endpoint.modules_structure: PASS - Each module has name, description, icon, category, files, resources, variables, outputs

Backend_Existing_Endpoints.GET_overview: PASS - Returns terraform, lambda, github_actions config status
Backend_Existing_Endpoints.GET_lambda_live: PASS - Returns connected=true with Lambda functions
Backend_Existing_Endpoints.GET_github_runs: PASS - Returns connected=true with workflow runs

Frontend_TerraformModules_Components.section_terraform_modules: PASS - Collapsible section with '30 resources' badge
Frontend_TerraformModules_Components.module_cards: PASS - All 11 modules displayed with icons, categories, descriptions
Frontend_TerraformModules_Components.module_expansion: PASS - Shows resources, variables, outputs, file tabs
Frontend_TerraformModules_Components.terraform_environments: PASS - PROD and STAGING buttons with 3 files each
